examples: The next game will be a real test of their mettle.
His first important chance to show his mettle came when he opened the new session of the legislature.
Each and every one of these soldiers has proved his mettle.
Mettle Hill was closed in 1996 as a result of anti-social behaviour and public disorder issues.
Andrew Lansley backed opponents to South Cambridgeshire District Council's plan to reopen Mettle Hill in Meldreth.
